name: Mint Chip Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat eggs and sugar in a large mixing bowl until well blended.
2. Stir in evaporated milk, peppermint extract, and food coloring.
3. Gently stir in grated chocolate.
4. Refrigerate until well chilled.
5. Pour into an ice cream freezer container.
6. Churn and freeze according to manufacturer's directions.
7. Makes about 2 quarts.
